settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Set up your NetSuite OAuth credentials and Claude API key to connect the assistant.

coa.title: Subsidiary & Chart of Accounts
coa.description: Create the subsidiary in NetSuite and/or import the chart of accounts from a spreadsheet.

customers.title: Customers
customers.description: Import the company's customer records from spreadsheets.

vendors.title: Vendors
vendors.description: Import the company's vendor records from spreadsheets.

items.title: Items
items.description: Import the company's product and service catalog.

taxRules.title: Tax Rules
taxRules.description: Import NF-e XML files for output rules and SPED files for input rules.
